js.home: const cate=env.get("category");const page=env.get("page");let url;if(cate=="/"){url=env.baseUrl;}else{url=`${env.baseUrl}/index.php/vod/type/id/${cate}/page/${page}.html`;}const {data} = await env.axios.get(url);const $=env.parseHTML(data);return $(".videoContent li").toArray().map(item=>{const a=$(item).find(".videoName");return{id:a.attr("href"),title:a.text().trim(),cover:"",remark:$(item).find(".time").text().trim()};});
js.detail: const id=env.get("movieId");const url=`${env.baseUrl}${id}`;const {data} = await env.axios.get(url);const $=env.parseHTML(data);const desc=$(".detail-info .desc").text()||"жҡӮж— з®Җд»Ӣ";const playlist=[{title:"ж’ӯж”ҫжәҗ",videos:[{id:id,text:"ж’ӯж”ҫ"}]}];return{desc,playlist};
js.search: const wd=env.get("keyword");const page=env.get("page");const url=`${env.baseUrl}/index.php/vod/search/page/${page}/wd/${wd}.html`;const {data} = await env.axios.get(url);const $=env.parseHTML(data);return $(".videoContent li").toArray().map(item=>{const a=$(item).find(".videoName");return{id:a.attr("href"),title:a.text().trim(),cover:""};});
